raw_text:
бһҳбһҮбҹ’бһҲбһҳбһҺбҹ’бһҢбһӣбһҮбһ¶бһҸбһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһҪбһҸбһ–бһ·бһ“бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҷбһӮбһ»бһҺбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ–бҹҗбһ“бҹ’бһ’бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһҖбһ¶бһҡ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ–бһ“бҹ’бһӣбһҸбҹӢбһўбһӮбҹ’бһӮбһ·бһ—бҹҗбһҷ
National Quality Inspection Centre for Fire Safety Systems
еӣҪе®¶ж¶ҲйҳІе·ҘзЁӢе»әзӯ‘жЈҖжҹҘдёӯеҝғ
Room 906-907, 9th Floor, Exchange Square, Street 106, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia.
Tel: + 855-023 23192627 Email: info@nationalfirepreventioncentres.com

Fire Certificate Report Endorsement (Duty 1) [redacted]

Background
[redacted] had a commercial tower recently completed by the contractor [redacted]. The site consists of a [redacted] tall office block on [redacted] Phnom Penh. This is the corporate headquarters of [redacted] in Cambodia and serves as an office use. It is classified in the National Standard - Building Design Code - Fire Safety Systems as a high rise public building.

Cambodia Fairwind Enterprise Company Limited (CFE) is the company that has the contract with the Ministry of Interior of Cambodia establishing 5 National Centers for Fire Safety and standards. They are: The National Quality Inspection Center for Fire Equipment (NICE). The National Quality Inspection Center for Fire Safety Systems (NICS), The National Fire Academy of Cambodia (NFAC), The National Fire Engineering Institute (NFEI) and The National Fire Hazard Investigation and Data Management Centre (NFID). Each Center has its own Prakas issued by the Ministry of Interior which is delegated with special duties in Fire Safety aspects. Since last August, they are responsible for every aspect of fire safety and the primary tool for ensuring compliance to the Fire Code referred to herein.

The Fire Certificates are processed by the NICS Centre, managed by the General Commissariat of National Police (GCNP), Ministry of Interior (MOI) and operated by Cambodia Fairwind Enterprise Company Limited (CFE). The inspection work and technical assessments are undertaken by NICS, however pre-assessment and compliance consultancy work has been undertaken so far in this case by CFE.

бһ‘бҹҶбһ–бҹҗбһҡбһ‘бһё бҹЎбҹҰбҹҰ бһ“бҹғ бҹЎбҹ§бҹҰ
